file_insights.changes_summary: Added JSON-RPC fallback mechanism to CodexProvider
key_additions: RpcResponse, RpcRateLimitWindow, RpcRateLimitsResult structs for JSON-RPC typing
parse_rpc_response() - decoupled parsing logic for unit testability
fetch_via_rpc() - 5-second timeout wrapper around RPC exchange
rpc_exchange() - async process spawn and bidirectional JSON-RPC handshake
Modified fetch() to fallback to RPC when OAuth credentials missing/expired

patterns_discovered.description: Initialize request (id:1) followed by account/rateLimits/read (id:2), both awaiting specific response IDs
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures correct initialization state before requesting rate limits

patterns_discovered.pattern: Line-based response filtering in streaming I/O
patterns_discovered.description: Read lines from stdout, skip non-matching responses, match on JSON-RPC id field
patterns_discovered.benefit: Handles potential out-of-order or notification messages from codex process

patterns_discovered.description: OAuth → RPC fallback, each failure returns ProviderSnapshot with error rather than propagating
patterns_discovered.benefit: Never crashes provider; always returns usable snapshot with error context

patterns_discovered.description: parse_rpc_response() isolated from process spawning logic
patterns_discovered.benefit: Unit tests can validate parsing without mocking process spawn
Enforces 5-second global timeout; prevents hung process

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Non-matching JSON-RPC responses must be skipped
gotchas_discovered.context: Codex may emit notifications or out-of-order messages; matching only on id=1 or id=2
gotchas_discovered.impact: Infinite loop if response matching logic is too strict
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Continue loop skips empty lines and non-matching IDs; breaks on matched response

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Process lifecycle: kill_on_drop vs explicit kill()
gotchas_discovered.context: Child process has kill_on_drop(true) but code also calls explicit kill().await
gotchas_discovered.impact: Redundant but safe; explicit kill ensures immediate termination before parsing
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Keep both for defensive cleanup; Rust drop will not double-kill

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Timeout scope must enclose entire exchange, not per-operation
gotchas_discovered.context: 5-second timeout wraps rpc_exchange(), not individual read_line() calls
gotchas_discovered.impact: Individual reads could theoretically exceed 5s if each were timed separately
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Timeout at fetch_via_rpc level ensures hard deadline for full exchange

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Serde JSON number matching requires serde_json::Value::Number constructor
gotchas_discovered.context: Comparing RPC id field (Number) with literal integers
gotchas_discovered.impact: Direct comparison `resp.id == 1` would fail; requires Value wrapping

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Empty reset_at or missing window_type must be handled gracefully
gotchas_discovered.context: Option fields with #[serde(default)] prevent deserialization failures
gotchas_discovered.impact: Malformed RPC response still produces snapshot (no hard error)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: .and_then() chains safely skip None values; return error inside snapshot instead of propagating

approach_outcome.objective: Add JSON-RPC fallback to CodexProvider.fetch() when OAuth unavailable
approach_outcome.execution: Implemented complete RPC protocol with timeout, proper process lifecycle, and fallback integration
approach_outcome.testing: Added unit tests for parse_rpc_response() with mock JSON samples
approach_outcome.integration: Seamlessly integrated into existing fetch() method without breaking OAuth path
approach_outcome.key_decision: Separated RPC parsing from process spawning to enable unit testing without process mocks

recommendations.recommendation: Add exponential backoff retry logic for RPC failures (network blips, codex startup delay)
recommendations.rationale: 5-second timeout may be insufficient if codex binary is slow to initialize
recommendations.implementation: Wrap rpc_exchange() with retry::async_retry or manual loop

recommendations.recommendation: Add structured logging for RPC fallback activation and success/failure counts
recommendations.rationale: Understand frequency and duration of OAuth failures in production
recommendations.implementation: Log at info level when OAuth fails, debug level for RPC exchange steps

recommendations.recommendation: Cache RPC responses for 60+ seconds to avoid repeated process spawns
recommendations.rationale: Spawning codex process on every snapshot fetch is expensive; rate limits don't change frequently

recommendations.recommendation: Document JSON-RPC schema version expected from codex binary
recommendations.rationale: codex may evolve RPC response structure; hardcoded field names will break
recommendations.implementation: Add CODEX_RPC_VERSION constant and version check in initialize response

recommendations.recommendation: Consider handling codex binary not found on PATH more explicitly
recommendations.rationale: spawn() error is context-rich but could be improved for user diagnostics
recommendations.implementation: Check PATH and suggest installation before spawn attempt
